## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential job opportunity for Mara at fwd.digital and provide more details about the company's operations and growth plans.](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital is rapidly growing, currently at $6M ARR with aims to reach $15-22M by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Company offers editorial and programmatic SEO services, with plans to expand into other content-related work streams](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Role discussed could be Managing Editor or Associate Managing Director, overseeing multiple client accounts](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Compensation would include base salary, bonus/commission, and equity with favorable terms](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview and Growth

  - [Currently at $6M ARR, aiming for $15-22M by year-end (5-7x growth)](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [35 accounts now, targeting 100 by end of year](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Recently raised funding from tier-one VC (Madrona)](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [62 deals in pipeline, growing without active marketing](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Q4 gross margin was 71%, now have $12M in bank to fuel growth](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

### Service Offerings

  - [Primary focus (80-90%) on long-form editorial and programmatic SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [50-100k words/month for editorial, few hundred pages/month for programmatic](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Additional services: link building, AI outbound, content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Plans to expand into social content, newsletters, research, product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)

### Workflow and Technology

  - [Developed AI-powered workflows for client onboarding, research, and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Constantly iterating and improving workflows and platform](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Engineering team rapidly building and refining internal tools](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)

### Client Engagement

  - [90-day pilot period, followed by 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Multiple work streams per client (editorial, programmatic, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Aiming to be an extension of client's team, using Slack for communication](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

### Potential Roles for Mara

1.  Managing Editor:
    
      - [More hands-on with content strategy and client work](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [Leading a team, but still involved in day-to-day operations](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

2.  Associate Managing Director:
    
      - [Overseeing 2 pods (5-8 accounts each)](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Mix of client-facing work, team management, and business development](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [Potential for revenue-based bonus structure](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

### Company Culture and Benefits

  - [Netflix-inspired culture with employee-friendly equity terms](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Extended exercise windows for stock options (1 year vs. 90 days)](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Guaranteed severance for any termination case](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=2471.0)
  - [Emphasis on work-life integration and family-friendly policies](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to meet with Bridget (another team member) tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [Marcel to send preliminary offer details tonight](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=2205.0)
  - [If all aligns, formal offer could be extended as soon as tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Potential start date of March 10th, if agreeable to Mara](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Mara to consider timeline and impact on current role/team](https://fathom.video/share/JDGBydWvPcoCVXAFnNuzkLyxY1VfgxaD?tab=summary&timestamp=2796.0)
